behavior_in_task_description.reason: All asserted paths (minimist.ts, program.ts, session.ts, DEPS.list, package.json, CLAUDE.md), literal strings ('should not be passed with '=value'', 'Never add "Generated with" in commit message'), and expected exports are named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to change (imports, types, validation logic) but doesn't provide the actual minimist implementation code.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for required exports, imports, and behavior; alternative valid implementations would still pass since they check interfaces/functions by name as required by the spec.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: test_typescript_compiles runs tsc, test_boolean_option_with_equals_throws runs tsx to execute the code, though many other tests are text-based checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require actual implementation (tsc compile, runtime throw behavior, proper imports) - a stub would fail typescript compilation and the boolean throw test.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover vendored minimist creation, program.ts/session.ts updates, DEPS.list, package.json removal, and CLAUDE.md rule.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are organized into three labeled categories with comments (Code Behavior, Config/Documentation, Pass-to-Pass).

structured_data_schema.reason: Task does not produce structured data output.

no_typos.reason: No typos detected in paths or commands.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the files to modify because the task is explicitly about updating them; no specific line-number leakage.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: CLAUDE.md diff adds a single line in the Commit Convention section; package.json/DEPS.list edits are localized.
